1 · Pre-auth & onboarding

Splash → path + language → role landing → mobile-password sign-in → registration → password reset

Splash/
Path + language · Client / Worker/path
Welcome to Re'Loren
Pick your language and how you want to start. You can switch anytime from your profile.
LANGUAGE PREFERENCE
CHOOSE YOUR PATH
Client
Post jobs and hire workers. No verification needed to post.
Worker
Find jobs and earn. Needs identity verification.
Landing · slider + CTAs/landing
POST
Post a job in your own words
Bangla, Banglish or English — workers find you.
WORK
Earn on your own schedule
Get daily job matches at your preferred time.
TRUST
Identity-verified marketplace
NID + live photo checks on every worker.
Premium workforce marketplace for Bangladesh.

Sign in
Enter your mobile number and password.

OR
New to Re'Loren?
Verify OTP/login/otp
Verify OTP
Enter the 4-digit code sent to
+880 1711-234567

Wrong code
Incorrect code — try again.
Resend OTP in 00:42
Preview wrong-code state →

2 · Worker verification

Onboarding intro → NID upload → facial capture → emergency contact (under review)

Worker verification intro/worker/intro
Worker Verification
Get Verified
Complete these steps to start receiving high-value jobs and daily payments.
National ID
Front and back photo of your NID card
Face Verification
Live photos to confirm your identity
Emergency Contact
A person we can reach in an emergency
Skill Selection
Tell us what you can do best
Skill certificate
Upload a certificate for your skill (optional)
Your data is encrypted and only used for identity verification.
NID upload/worker/nid
Upload NID
Upload a clear photo of your NID
National ID card — both sides required.
Front side
NID front — nid-front.jpg
Replace
Back side
NID back — nid-back.jpg
Replace
Selfie holding your NID
Hold your NID beside your face — details must stay readable.
Accepts JPG, PNG, PDF — max 5 MB per file.
Documents Received!
We've received your NID. Our team will verify it within 24 hours.
Facial capture/worker/face
Verification · Photo 1/3
Look straight at camera
Gallery is disabled — camera only
1 2 3
Verification Complete!
Your identity verification is being reviewed. You can now access worker features.
Emergency contact/worker/emergency
Emergency Contact
Verification under review
Your identity verification is being reviewed by our team. This usually takes less than 24 hours. Add an emergency contact to finish.
EMERGENCY CONTACT
Verify contact phone
We sent a 4-digit code to
+880 1711-234567
Demo code: 1234

3 · Skill & asset declaration

Free-text + searchable skill list → asset list → add / preview / success / details

Skill declaration/worker/skills
Declare Skills
Skill & asset declaration guide
Watch this tutorial fully — "Declare skills" unlocks only after the video finishes.
Add what you can do
Search the list, or add a custom skill if not found.
e.g. "I can drive a car, be a house maid, cook deshi/Chinese food" — add any skill you have, separated by commas (,).
Or you can select skill from below list
Ride sharing by car
Car driver
Electrician
AC technician
Plumber
YOUR SKILLS (2 ADDED)
SKILL CERTIFICATE (OPTIONAL)
Confirm your skills
You have these skills. Please confirm to proceed further.
Declare your assets?
Adding assets (motorbike, tools, etc.) helps you match more jobs. You can add them later from your profile.

4 · Client · post & match

Employer home → free-text post → auto-generated review → success → ranked shortlist → reviews

Employer home/employer/home
KA
Karim Ahmed 4.8
Motijheel, Dhaka
CLIENT
Need help today?
Post a job in your own words and get bids in minutes.
Physical jobs and asset services are matched to nearby workers on the map — pay online or with cash. Online jobs are paid online only (bKash / Nagad).
You are allowed to post one skill and one asset related service at a time in each post.
ACTIVE JOB
Medicine delivery4 bids
Posted 12 min ago৳1,500 budget
OPPORTUNITY JOB (PREVIEW)
What kind of job?
Online Job
Done remotely · paid online (bKash / Nagad)

On-site work matched to nearby workers · cash or online

No match in time — try one of the options below
No worker found in time
We couldn't match a worker for your job yet. Choose how you'd like to continue.
1 · Change your offer
A higher offer attracts more workers.
৳1,500
2 · Switch to Long Duration / Time Flexible
The job moves to your Posted Jobs and shows in the worker feed under "Still active".
3 · Try again later
Pause matching now — restart it any time from Posted Jobs.

Frequent cancellations hurt your standing on the platform. Continue only if it's truly necessary.

No payment method

Help & support/help
Help & Support
FAQ
How do bids work?
Workers place bids on your job. You choose who to hire based on bid amount, rating, and distance.
When is my payment released?
Payment is released to the worker only after you mark the job complete. Until then, it sits in escrow.
What if I cancel?
Before work starts: full refund on online payments. After work starts: partial refund based on progress.
How do I verify as a worker?
Go to Profile → Verification and upload your NID, take 3 facial photos, and optionally a skill certificate.
Why is there a 15% commission?
The platform fee covers escrow, matching, dispute resolution, and support.
Terms & conditions/terms
Terms & Privacy
LAST UPDATED 01 JAN 2026
1. Who we are
Re'Loren Technologies Ltd. operates the Re'Loren app, a platform connecting clients and workers for informal, task-based work in Bangladesh.
2. Your account
You must be 18 or older, provide accurate info, and keep your phone number current. One account per person.
3. Payments & escrow
For online payments, funds are held by our licensed escrow partner until the job is marked complete. A 15% platform fee is deducted from the worker's gross bid.
4. Worker verification
Workers must submit a valid NID, facial photos, and (optionally) skill certificates. Verification decisions are reviewed manually within 24 hours.
5. Disputes
If something goes wrong, open a dispute within 7 days. Our team investigates within 48 hours and can release, refund, or split escrow funds.
6. Prohibited uses
No illegal work, no harassment, no sharing of contact details outside the app, no price collusion among workers.
Full policy available at reloren.bd/terms
